underwater dolphin kick POV with dramatic backlighting

recommended_visual_style: dark cinematic pre-dawn pool atmosphere — lone swimmer mid-stroke, warm mist above cool-blue lit water, orange accent reflections on lane ropes, high-contrast dramatic lighting
content_angle: The 5am session — when the pool is dark, the air is cold, and only the truly dedicated show up
key_insight: Authentic 'early grind' content outperforms staged race-day shots in organic reach for athletic brands in 2026 — audiences respond to the relatable discipline of pre-dawn training over polished competition imagery. NZ autumn (April) makes the cold-morning atmosphere seasonally resonant.
seasonal_hook: NZ autumn April 2026 — cold mornings, warm pool steam, the contrast of discipline in the dark before the world wakes up. NAGS 2026 just concluded (April 8–12), making 'what comes next / back to training' a timely narrative.
